title: Emmy Fyles Not Like That Youre Doing It Wrong
description: A cult of "trad wives" rules the socials... a woman has her bum filled with concrete, and everyone's fave way to unwind is with a murder podcast. It's not an imagined dystopian future - it's just being a woman in 2026, and tbh it's a bit of a bin fire bbz. Join Emmy Fyles (BBC3, Comedy Central, LADbible) as she brings her multimedia “extravaganza” (PowerPoint lol) to Brighton Fringe. Expect a deep dive into why everything’s gone a bit tits-up - and whether the internet has any advice that isn’t completely deranged. (No worries if not)
